Hero.headline: Winter Stays on the Costa del Sol
Hero.subtitle: Silver-Standard certified accommodation, legal and healthcare support — so you can focus on enjoying your stay.
Hero.imageAlt: Sunset in Marbella - Panoramic view of the Costa del Sol

StepsSection.title: Three simple steps to make your stay a reality
StepsSection.step1Desc: Share your health needs, mobility and social preferences in 2 minutes.
StepsSection.step2Desc: Your personal manager will contact you to fine-tune every detail of your landing in Spain.
StepsSection.step3Desc: Logistics, healthcare and community ready for your arrival. You just enjoy the sun.
StepsSection.imageAlt: Premium terrace with Mediterranean views - Silver Stays stay
